report.summary: Drafted 5 tweets (#280-284) for Apr 20-26 covering post-tax-deadline sentiment divergence, RWA Tokenization 5-tweet thread ($26B+), Glamsterdam upgrade preview, Magic Eden wallet shutdown commentary, and weekend Fear & Greed stat. Newsletter v9 supplement with RWA focus + bear market guide tie-in. 2 new social card SVGs (RWA $26B+ and Fear & Greed Divergence). Fills the Apr 20-26 content gap. Full calendar now covers Apr 7-26 across v7-v9 cycles.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #280: Post-Tax-Deadline Sentiment Divergence — data tweet (Sun Apr 20, 2PM ET) highlighting BTC recovery vs F&G 8/100, links to bear market investing guide
Tweet #281: RWA Tokenization Thread — 5-tweet educational thread (Mon Apr 21, 3PM ET) covering $26B+ tokenized, BlackRock BUIDL $2.5B, $17B private credit, tokenized payroll pilot, risks
Tweet #282: Glamsterdam Preview — educational tweet (Wed Apr 23, 1PM ET) covering Ethereum's next upgrade targeting 10,000+ TPS, privacy, post-Pectra roadmap
Tweet #283: Magic Eden + Bear Market Structure — news commentary (Thu Apr 24, 1PM ET) on wallet shutdown signaling consolidation, utility-first survival thesis
Tweet #284: Weekend Fear & Greed Stat — data nugget (Sat Apr 26, 11AM ET) with 60+ day Extreme Fear streak, price-sentiment divergence as historical bullish signal

Newsletter v9 supplement: Market Pulse (BTC $68,511, Q1 -24%, $2.42T cap, F&G 8), New on degen0x (RWA Tokenization Guide), Worth Reading (Bear Market + ETH Upgrades guides), Degen Corner (Magic Eden shutdown, Eightco $326M holdings, tokenized payroll pilot)
Discord/Telegram: RWA Tokenization + bear market guide announcement (Mon Apr 21, 5PM ET)
Total tweets all-time: 284 (5 new this cycle), content scheduled Apr 20-26

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: Social card SVG: RWA Tokenization $26B+ (1200x630, dark theme, amber-gold gradient — big $26B+ number, 3 stat cards: BUIDL $2.5B / Private Credit $17B / +185.8% returns, protocol chips: BlackRock / JPMorgan / Franklin Templeton / Plume-Toku, degen0x glass-morphism palette)

sections.title: Top Performing Content (Estimated — No GSC Data Available)
Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: SENTIMENT DIVERGENCE OPPORTUNITY: BTC recovering (+3%) while Fear & Greed at 8/100 for 60+ days (all-time record). This divergence is historically bullish and creates strong engagement hooks for social content.

RWA TOKENIZATION SURGE: $26B+ tokenized, BlackRock BUIDL at $2.5B, private credit at $17B. Was 2025's most profitable narrative (+185.8%). Tokenized payroll pilots (Plume/Toku/WisdomTree) signal mainstream adoption. Strong content angle.
POST-TAX TRAFFIC SHIFT: Tax Guide and Calculator traffic will decline after Apr 15 deadline. Bear Market Investing Guide and Fear & Greed tools become primary traffic drivers in post-deadline period.
ETHEREUM ROADMAP CONTENT: Pectra shipped May 2025. Glamsterdam (mid-2026) and Heze-Bogota (late 2026) are next. ETH upgrade content should be refreshed to reflect current roadmap.

BEAR MARKET CONSOLIDATION: Magic Eden wallet shutdown, ZKsync Lite sunsetting. Single-purpose crypto products failing in bear. Utility-first platforms (like degen0x) benefit from this consolidation narrative.
CONTENT CALENDAR STATUS: v7 covered Apr 7-12, v8 covers Apr 13-19, v9 now covers Apr 20-26. Full 3-week calendar. Next gap: Apr 27-May 3.
626 published slugs. 0 in queue. 12 learn pages on disk awaiting inclusion. Commit+push remains highest-leverage growth action.

sections.title: Market Context
items: BTC: $68,511 (+3% relief rally on Iran de-escalation hopes)
ETH: $2,104 (consolidating post-Pectra)
Total crypto market cap: $2.42T, 24h volume $116.5B
Fear & Greed: 8/100 — 60+ day Extreme Fear streak (all-time record)
RWA tokenized: $26B+ (BlackRock BUIDL $2.5B, private credit $17B)
Q1 2026 BTC return: -24% (worst since 2018)
Magic Eden wallet: export-only Apr 1, full shutdown May 1
Eightco: $326M crypto holdings, 277M WLD (~9% of circulating supply)
Tokenized payroll: Plume/Toku/WisdomTree pilot live
Ethereum next upgrades: Glamsterdam (mid-2026), Heze-Bogota (late 2026)

sections.title: Data Correction Notes
items: CORRECTED: Pectra upgrade launched May 7, 2025 (not Apr 10, 2026 as some earlier drafts referenced). Previous tweets correctly reference post-Pectra context.
CORRECTED: Scroll Bernoulli upgrade was April 2024, not a 2026 event. Earlier draft references should be treated as historical context.
